alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Coffee Maker" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassTurnOn × switch. Kitchen appliance switch. Friendly name 'Coffee Maker' (no 'Switch' suffix) — confabulation risk for entity_id (switch.kitchen_coffee_maker not switch.coffee_maker_switch).

utterance: turn off the office space heater

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Office thermostat could also be interpreted as the heating source. Switch is the direct device; climate controls HVAC mode.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassTurnOff × switch. Cross-domain heater disambiguation: switch.office_space_heater vs climate.office_thermostat. Switch domain is correct for 'space heater' as a physical device.

metadata.notes: Step 2: Irrigation zone subtype. Numbered zone naming pattern tests model's ability to match colloquial 'zone 4' to 'Irrigation Zone 4 Back'. Switch is currently on.

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Smart Plug 3" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 2: Arealess smart plug subtype. switch.smart_plug_3 has no area assignment — worst-case naming (generic numbered name + no area). Must use name-based targeting.

utterance: turn off the back yard switches

metadata.notes: Step 5: Area-scoped switch command. Back Yard has 9+ switch entities (irrigation zones, pool equipment, fountain, mister, shed power, string lights). Model should use area+domain targeting rather than listing entities.
